mapper.sql: id, apply_info_id, award_name, first_author_type, first_author_code, first_author_name, product_name, dept_id, apply_date, award_level, classs, discipline, productproj_ectsource, product_mode, is_registered, our_unit_ranking, award, file_ids, note, check_status, creator_code, creator_name, create_time, operate_time, year, reward_type, main_completer_id
mapper.select: select saa.id as rowId, saa.apply_info_id as applyInfoId, saa.award_name as awardName, saa.product_name as productName, fdept.id as "deptId.id",fdept.name as "deptId.name",fdept.name as deptName, saa.apply_date as applyDate, saa.data_status as dataStatus, csal.code as "awardLevel.id",csal.name as "awardLevel.name",csal.name as awardLevelName, sclass.code as "classCode.id",sclass.name as "classCode.name",sclass.name as classCodeName, fdiscipline.code as "discipline.id",fdiscipline.name as "discipline.name", fdiscipline.name as disciplineName, saa.productproj_ectsource, cspm.code as "productMode.id",cspm.name as "productMode.name",cspm.name as productModeName, saa.is_registered as isRegistered, csuo.code as "ourUnitRanking.id", csuo.name as "ourUnitRanking.name",saa.note,csuo.name as ourUnitRankingName, saa.check_status, saa.creator_code, saa.creator_name, saa.create_time,saa.operate_time, syear.code as "year.id",syear.name as "year.name",syear.name as yearName, csrt.code as "rewardType.id",csrt.name as "rewardType.name",csrt.name as rewardTypeName, suser.id as "mainCompleterId.id",suser.name as "mainCompleterId.name",suser.name as mainCompleterName from srm_award_apply saa left join ct_srm_year syear on syear.code=saa.year left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=saa.dept_id left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=saa.classCode left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=saa.discipline left join ct_srm_unit_order csuo on csuo.code=saa.our_unit_ranking left join ct_srm_award_level csal on csal.code=saa.award_level left join ct_srm_reward_type csrt on csrt.code=saa.reward_type left join ct_srm_product_mode cspm on cspm.code=saa.product_mode left join ct_srm_rely_unit suser on suser.id=saa.main_completer_id where saa.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_award_apply
data_status = #{status},
check_status = #{checkStatus},
sub_date = #{subDate},
sub_user_id = #{subUserId},
where id=#{rowId}
mapper.select:
select saa.id as rowId, saa.apply_info_id as applyInfoId, saa.award_name as awardName, saa.product_name as productName, fdept.name as deptName, saa.apply_date as applyDate, saa.data_status as dataStatus, csal.name as awardLevelName,sclass.name as classCodeName, fdiscipline.name as disciplineName, saa.productproj_ectsource, cspm.name as productModeName, saa.is_registered as isRegistered, csuo.name as ourUnitRankingName,saa.note, saa.check_status, saa.creator_code, saa.creator_name, saa.create_time,saa. operate_time,saai.apply_name as applyInfoName, syear.name as yearName, csrt.name as rewardTypeName, suser.name as mainCompleterName,cuser.name as creatorName from srm_award_apply saa left join ct_srm_year syear on syear.code=saa.year left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=saa.dept_id left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=saa.classCode left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=saa.discipline left join ct_srm_unit_order csuo on csuo.code=saa.our_unit_ranking left join ct_srm_award_level csal on csal.code=saa.award_level left join ct_srm_reward_type csrt on csrt.code=saa.reward_type left join ct_srm_product_mode cspm on cspm.code=saa.product_mode left join ct_srm_rely_unit suser on suser.id=saa.main_completer_id left join ct_srm_user cuser on cuser.id=saa.creator_id
left join srm_award_apply_info saai on saai.id=saa.apply_info_id left join cf_srm_eaf_rec eafrec on eafrec.sys_no="P045" and eafrec.check_rec_id=saa.id where eafrec.step_no>1
and ( (saa.data_status=1 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{awardApplyDto.userId}, '|%')) or (eafrec.step_no = (select max(step_no) from cf_srm_eaf_rec seafrec where saa.sys_no=seafrec.sys_no and seafrec.check_rec_id=saa.id) and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{awardApplyDto.userId}, '|%') and eafrec.check_datetime is not null) or (saa.data_status=0 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.check_result=3 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{awardApplyDto.userId}, '|%')) )
and saa.data_status=1 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{awardApplyDto.userId}, '|%')
and saa.data_status=1 and eafrec.check_result="2" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{awardApplyDto.userId}, '|%')
and saa.data_status=0 and eafrec.check_result="3" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{awardApplyDto.userId}, '|%')
and saa.award_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{awardApplyDto.awardName}, '%')
